title: The Smell Of The Sacrifice.
content:
The gods require the thighs
    Of beeves for sacrifice;
    Which roasted, we the steam
    Must sacrifice to them,
    Who though they do not eat,
    Yet love the smell of meat.
meaning:
Robert Herrick's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "The Smell Of The Sacrifice."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
